MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Val Simpson.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Keith Porter is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-25-2013 is vacated.
